text_block_list.text: A few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, let us commence our strategy meeting for the
second Spring Choice Chocolatier Contest. I, Mihono Bourbon, will
lead.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hold up, are those the uniforms?! The quality is crazy good!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is. Even I'm surprised by how well-made and beautiful they look.
We decided to wear them so that we could get used to working in
them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I knew that design would fit you perfectly! You look great, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I am grateful for your insight during the selection process.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Ah, our introduction has overrun by one minute. Shall we get started,
then?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The brief for this year's contest is to create a dessert based on the
school.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: So based on Tracen?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I conducted a survey of all the academy's students and inquired what
images of Tracen come to mind.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
From that, I took the most popular answer—the training grounds—and
made a design based on that motif.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
We're aiming to have the recipe finalized at least five days before the
contest, allowing room for trial and error along the way.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So we'd like to see what things you all would want to add. Your
suggestions could be of great assistance to us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-then can I give it a try too?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Let's split into two teams. I'll go with Bourbon and
Bakushin O, and you'll be with Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! So you would have me as captain of whipped cream?
Leave it in my capable hands! I'll have it whipped up before you know
it!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O, there's a whisk cooling in the fridge, so please use that
one.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Got it!
It's freezing!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Heh, apologies. Using a warm whisk would weaken the structure of
the fats in the cream, making it harder to contain air.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Recorded to memory logs. I've learned something new today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (W-wow... Amazing. She's got the knowledge and the techniques of a pro!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Wait! This is no time to be standing around gawking! I was lucky
enough to be invited, so I'd better make myself useful!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is now time to present the completed trial cakes. Each cake will
receive feedback. Please begin with ours, Flash.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. This is a trifle themed on the training grounds. We've replicated
the appearance of the real grounds on a miniature scale.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Next, Flower and Jordan. Please present your cake for evaluation.
...Um, where is your cake?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... You see...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(The idea is to make something that will be useful for Flash... Which
means it's got to be high-level...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let's try making an opera cake! I think having a top layer of glossy
chocolate would be a good way to represent the prestige of Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aight... Wait, hold up. Is this recipe for real?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Buttercream, ganache, coffee syrup, glazing—all ready. The cake
batter is nice and cool now too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I am shook! You pretty much did everything on your own! What's left? To put it all together?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'll go ahead and do it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Gently... Gently... Phew, that's the coffee syrup on. Now for... the
buttercream...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (What?! It solidified!)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Oh, I must've been too slow. Oh no! Okay, I've just got to melt it in a
bain-marie...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Aah!
Crash!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And in my panic, I dropped the cake batter... So we couldn't finish
the cake in time. I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I see... I'm sorry I didn't notice the difficulties you were having.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But failure is all a part of the baking process. Please don't let it
dampen your spirits.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay! I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but don't let me disrupt you any further! Please continue with your
evaluation!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well, about that...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've made this trial cake, I've realized... I'm not sure if it's
enough to really represent Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The grounds have an impressive variety of courses—that much is true.
But perhaps this is too literal...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please let me hear your opinions. When you look at this trifle, do you
feel like it represents Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: The Four
text_block_list.text: Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you. That settles it. This won't be enough to win first prize.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I believe... we'll have to go a step further with the concept. First, let's
think of ways to expand on—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, we only have thirty minutes and twenty seconds left of our
session. Let's move on to cleaning up and continue next time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...
Whew... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heeey! You lookin' kinda sad, bestie. You okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan! Well, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking... I wish I was a bit more reliable, you know? That's
all it is. N-nothing to worry about, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... Sigh... Great, now she's apologizing to me too...

text_block_list.name: Quiet Classmate
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Listen, bestie! Let's just have some fun and eat something good.
Things are gonna be lit!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna hear all the tea about your trainer! Let's go grab a burger!

text_block_list.name: Quiet Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I'm not feeling up for fun right now, so... maybe next time.
Thanks though.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, ah—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...
I haven't changed at all! Agh, I suck at this!
